
# integer overflow {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /overflow-int/_int-over-check-idea.qmd >}}

{{< include /overflow-int/_int-over-ex1.qmd >}}

{{< include /overflow-int/_int-over-ex2.qmd >}}

## exercise {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /overflow-int/_exercise1.qmd >}}

## trapping on overflow {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /overflow-int/_trap.qmd >}}
